full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #6 (2026-04-19)

PULSE
Health: 0.4984 (C). 879 wallets, 138 contributors. 53 memos today vs 128 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
42 reward payments, 194869 PFT distributed to 26 contributors. Top earner: r4WS8f...gMZH (28275 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 19,000 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (10,000 PFT). Lowest: r4ahFv...5XyU (9,000 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (69,800 PFT, avg 9,971/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rsS2Y6...aXRZ (61 memos). 5 new wallet(s) this week. 5 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 83.4%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-03-20): 7766 transactions from 84 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
